input:
Why does this prompt keep giving me generic output?

'Write a marketing email for our new product. Evaluate whether it is convincing. Suggest three improvements. Then tell me which version to send.'
output_rubric: Agent must identify four cognitive tasks mixed in one prompt (generate, evaluate, revise, decide). Must recommend splitting into sequenced prompts, not adding instructions. Must NOT suggest role, format, or chain-of-thought fixes.
